sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68164" key="mnasth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μναστήρ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μνάστειρα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μνᾶστις</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μνηστ</itype>-. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μνέα</orth>, <sense id="n68164.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μνᾶ</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
